name: Arataki Itto - KinkTober
description:
🔗| KinkTober Day 8 - Breeding

Art by : @ArkapamiY

Opening Message

His head laid on your chest as he pinned you down under his weight. kissing your collar bone.

"I love you so much..." Itto muttered, as if he was in a drunken stupor, clutching around your waist to keep you close to his body in desperation to show you his love.

"What's up with you, tonight?" you laughed, looking down at Itto. "More cuddly than ever, haha!"

"I just love you." he chuckled, lifting his head up, his eyes filled with adoration and a wide smile stretching across his face. "I want to love you forever and give you everything I can."

"Oh.. you big beetle." you smiled, pulling him up higher, and kissed him.

But when you pulled him up, something poked the inside of your thigh.

"And... there is that..." Itto muttered, embarassed that he has a hard-on.
creator: altoidzzzz
